## What primitive

## Where it would land

- [ ] New `mcp_servers/<name>/` (currently sketched in PRIMITIVES.md or not yet imagined)
- [ ] Missing tool in an existing server (`cal_log` / `metacog` / `schemaforge`)
- [ ] Refactor of an existing tool
